home.hero.body: Camel Global connects your car hire business directly with customers who need a vehicle delivered to them. You set the price, we bring you the work. No monthly fees. No lock-in. Works alongside your existing operation from day one.
home.stats.commissionLabel: Starting commission on hire price only
home.stats.fuelLabel: Fuel charge to nearest ¼ tank passed to you
home.nodisruption.title: Works alongside your existing business.
home.nodisruption.body: Camel Global isn't a replacement for how you work — it's an additional channel. You continue running your existing operation exactly as you do today. The Camel platform simply brings you extra bookings from customers you wouldn't otherwise reach. You choose which requests to bid on, and when.
home.nodisruption.item1: Keep your existing booking system and customers
home.nodisruption.item2: Only bid on jobs that suit your availability
home.nodisruption.item3: Your drivers use a simple app — no complex integration
home.nodisruption.item4: Set your own service radius to match your capacity
home.nodisruption.item5: No exclusive agreements — you're not locked in
home.how.title: From request to payout in 6 steps.
home.how.step1.title: Customer submits a request
home.how.step1.body: A customer enters their pickup location, drop-off point, dates, and vehicle type on the Camel Global customer site. The request is live instantly.
home.how.step2.title: You receive the request
home.how.step2.body: Every verified partner within the customer's chosen radius receives the request. You see full details and decide whether to bid.
home.how.step3.title: You place a bid
home.how.step3.body: Submit your price for the hire. You set the rate — we don't dictate pricing. The customer sees all bids side by side and picks the one that works for them.
home.how.step4.title: Booking confirmed
home.how.step4.body: When the customer accepts your bid, the booking is confirmed instantly. Your partner portal updates. You assign a driver and the job is ready.
home.how.step5.title: Driver delivers and collects
home.how.step5.body: Your driver delivers the car to the customer's location. Fuel levels are recorded at handover and collection to the nearest quarter tank via the driver app.
home.how.step6.title: Payout calculated automatically
home.how.step6.body: When the hire ends, the customer pays only for the fuel used to the nearest quarter tank. You receive: hire price minus commission, plus 100% of the fuel charge.
home.included.title: Everything you need to run your bookings.
home.included.bookings.title: Booking management
home.included.bookings.body: View every confirmed booking in one place. See full details, customer info, and booking status at a glance.
home.included.fleet.title: Fleet management
home.included.fleet.body: Add and manage your vehicles by category. Keep your fleet list accurate and always up to date.
home.included.driver.title: Driver portal
home.included.driver.body: Your drivers get their own login. They see assigned jobs, record fuel levels, and confirm insurance document handover — all from their phone.
home.included.fuel.title: Automatic fuel billing
home.included.fuel.body: Fuel is recorded at delivery and collection, rounded to the nearest quarter tank. The charge is calculated automatically — no manual maths, no disputes.
home.included.reports.title: Revenue reports
home.included.reports.body: Full financial reporting with commission and fuel breakdowns. Export to Excel for your records or accountant.
home.included.notifications.title: Instant notifications
home.included.notifications.body: Get notified the moment a new request lands in your area. Never miss a bid window.
home.included.ai.title: AI help widget
home.included.ai.body: Your team can ask the Camel Help assistant questions about bookings, the platform, or policies — right inside the portal.
home.included.currency.title: Multi-currency
home.included.currency.body: Full support for EUR, GBP, and USD. Bill your customers in the currency that works for your market.
home.included.terms.title: Terms & operating rules
home.included.terms.body: Read, download, and reference your partner agreement and operating rules any time from your account.
home.pricing.title: Simple, transparent fees.
home.pricing.body1: We charge a commission on the car hire price only. Fuel charges — calculated to the nearest quarter tank of actual usage — pass through to you at 100%. We never take a cut of the fuel.
home.pricing.body2: The starting commission rate is 20% of the hire price, subject to a minimum of €10 per booking. Commission rates can be reduced at Camel's discretion for partners with higher booking volumes — speak to us once you're live.
home.pricing.body3.end: . Settled automatically and paid directly to your bank account.
home.pricing.row1.label: Hire price
home.pricing.row1.note: What the customer pays for the car hire
home.pricing.row2.label: Camel commission (20%)
home.pricing.row3.label: Fuel charge (actual usage)
home.pricing.row3.note: 100% passed to you — no commission taken
home.pricing.row4.label: Your payout
home.pricing.row4.note: Paid directly to your bank account
home.pricing.disclaimer: Example only. Actual figures depend on your agreed rate and booking value.
home.insurance.title: Your responsibilities on every hire.
home.insurance.body: Every Camel Global booking carries clear insurance and documentation requirements. These are non-negotiable and apply to every hire regardless of length or value.
home.insurance.box1.title: Fully comprehensive cover is mandatory.
home.insurance.box1.body: Every vehicle delivered through the platform must be covered by fully comprehensive insurance at the time of hire — not a damage waiver or excess-based product. The insurance document must be physically handed to the customer by the driver at the point of collection. The driver confirms this handover in the app, and the customer confirms receipt. Both confirmations are recorded on the booking.
home.insurance.box2.title: Check the customer's licence before handing over the keys.
home.insurance.box2.body: If your insurance policy or local regulations require a copy of the customer's driving licence, it is the partner's responsibility to request and retain this at the point of vehicle handover. Your driver should not hand over the vehicle until any required licence documentation has been checked and recorded. Camel Global does not collect or store driving licence data on your behalf.
home.eligibility.title: What you need to apply.
home.eligibility.item1.title: A registered car hire business
home.eligibility.item1.body: You must operate as a legal entity — sole trader, S.L., S.A. or equivalent. We verify this during onboarding.
home.eligibility.item2.title: Valid licences and permits
home.eligibility.item2.body: All licences and permits required to operate a car hire business in your jurisdiction must be current and maintained.
home.eligibility.item3.title: Public liability insurance
home.eligibility.item3.body: Minimum €5,000,000 public liability cover required. All vehicles must be fully and comprehensively insured at the time of any hire.
home.eligibility.item4.title: A physical fleet base
home.eligibility.item4.body: You must have a base address from which vehicles can be dispatched. Used to match you with customers in range.
home.eligibility.item5.title: At least one active vehicle
home.eligibility.item5.body: Your fleet must have at least one active, roadworthy vehicle on the platform to start receiving requests.
home.eligibility.item6.title: A VAT or NIF number
home.eligibility.item6.body: Required for commission invoicing. For Spain-based partners, your NIF is mandatory for account activation.
home.cancellation.title: Clear rules. No surprises.
home.cancellation.col1.label: Customer cancels >48hrs before pickup
home.cancellation.col1.note: You had enough notice to re-list the vehicle.
home.cancellation.col2.label: Customer cancels <48hrs before pickup
home.cancellation.col2.payout: You keep the hire fee minus commission
home.cancellation.col2.note: You reserved the vehicle — you're compensated for that.
home.cancellation.col3.label: You cancel a confirmed booking
home.cancellation.col3.note: Partner cancellations are a breach of the operating rules and may result in suspension.
home.apply.title: Apply in under 5 minutes.
home.apply.body: Our signup process is quick and straightforward. Once approved, you can start bidding on customer requests immediately.
home.apply.step1.title: Fill in your details
home.apply.step1.body: Company name, contact info, business address, and fleet base location.
home.apply.step2.title: Set your password
home.apply.step2.body: Create your account credentials. Everything is encrypted and secure.
home.apply.step3.title: We review your application
home.apply.step3.body: Our team checks your details. You'll hear back within one business day.
home.apply.step4.title: Account activated
home.apply.step4.body: Once approved, log in and complete your profile — add vehicles, set your radius, and go live.
home.apply.step5.title: Start receiving requests
home.apply.step5.body: Customers in your area will see your bids. Win your first booking and get paid directly to your bank account.
home.driver.title: Are you a driver?
home.driver.body: If your car hire company is already on Camel Global, your manager will have set up your driver account. Log in to see your assigned jobs, record fuel levels, and confirm insurance handovers.
home.cta.title: Join Camel Global today.
home.cta.body: No monthly fees. No lock-in. Works alongside your existing business. More bookings, delivered to your door.
dashboard.title: Partner Dashboard
dashboard.stripe.setupTitle: Set up payouts to receive booking payments
dashboard.stripe.setupBody: Connect your bank account via Stripe so you can receive your earnings from completed bookings. Takes about 5 minutes.
dashboard.stripe.activeBody: Completed bookings are paid out monthly to your bank account.
dashboard.live.notLiveTitle: Your account is not yet live
dashboard.live.notLiveBody: Complete the following to start receiving customer requests:
dashboard.approval.underReviewBody: You will receive an email once approved. In the meantime you can complete your profile, add your fleet and drivers.
dashboard.noBookingsBody: Bookings will appear here once a customer accepts your bid.
dashboard.noRequestsBody: Customer requests within your service radius will appear here.
dashboard.checklist.title: Setup Checklist
dashboard.checklist.subtitle: Complete these steps to start receiving bookings.
